ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight entry */,
  "date_of_flight" TEXT /* Date when the flight took place */,
  "airline_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the airline operating the flight */,
  "flight_no" TEXT /* Flight number for tracking purposes */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin airport code */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination airport code */,
  "dep_delay" REAL /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "arr_delay" REAL /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "scheduled_dep_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_dep_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "scheduled_arr_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time of the flight */,
  "actual_arr_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in minutes */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the origin and destination in miles */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in pounds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin FOREIGN KEY ("origin") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport (IATA code) */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the airport is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the delay */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_duration" REAL /* Duration of the delay in minutes */,
  "delay_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on the flight (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the flight status */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_statuses_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Full name of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekdays" (
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekday */,
  "weekday_name" TEXT /* Full name of the weekday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being analyzed */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month the flight occurred in */,
  "weekday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weekday the flight occurred on */,
  "average_dep_delay" REAL /* Average departure delay for the month and weekday */,
  "average_arr_delay" REAL /* Average arrival delay for the month and weekday */,
  "flight_count" INTEGER /* Number of flights for the month and weekday */,
  "on_time_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of on-time flights for the month and weekday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_analysis_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_analysis_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_analysis_weekday_id FOREIGN KEY ("weekday_id") REFERENCES weekdays ("weekday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
